kw.name: Load Commands
kw.doc: Fetch both SharePoint lists, resolve lookups, and build the command cache.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{tele} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Step
kw.doc: Return the calculated step dict for (BlockCmdID, LimitType).

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{write_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=1 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_ASC_ASCEN | SetCommand=^@99300F2E0001000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{read_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=1 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_ASC_ASCEN | ReadCommand=^?99300F2E0001C2~ | ReadExpected=%^?99300F2E00010000000000000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Step
kw.doc: Return the calculated step dict for (BlockCmdID, LimitType).

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{write_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=2 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_Parameter_CO2SET | SetCommand=^@99301202150114000000000000000000000000000000000000000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{read_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=2 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_Parameter_CO2SET | ReadCommand=^?993012021501A0~ | ReadExpected=%^?993012021501140000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Step
kw.doc: Return the calculated step dict for (BlockCmdID, LimitType).

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{write_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=3 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_Parameter_DFR | SetCommand=^@99301202000104000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{read_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=3 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_Parameter_DFR | ReadCommand=^?9930120200019A~ | ReadExpected=%^?993012020001040000000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Step
kw.doc: Return the calculated step dict for (BlockCmdID, LimitType).

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{write_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=4 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_Parameter_O2SET | SetCommand=^@9930120216010A0000000000000000000000000000000000000000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{read_payload} = { DeviceID=ESPTESTSIMULATOR | SceneID=1 | TestCaseID=1 | TestCase=Set Low Values | Step=4 | BlockCmdID=ML5p2_99_Parameter_O2SET | ReadCommand=^?993012021601A1~ | ReadExpected=%^?9930120216010A00000000...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Wait For Blob File
kw.doc: Polls blob_root/{device_id}/{operation_hours}/ for any .json file. Returns the parsed content as a dict and deletes the file. Raises TimeoutError if no file appears within timeout seconds.

kw.name: Get Nested Value
kw.doc: Extract a value from a nested dict using a dot-separated path. e.g. "RefeerOperatingMode.AutomaticColdTreatmentMode" → data["RefeerOperatingMode"]["AutomaticColdTreatmentMode"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Get Nested Value
kw.doc: Extract a value from a nested dict using a dot-separated path. e.g. "RefeerOperatingMode.AutomaticColdTreatmentMode" → data["RefeerOperatingMode"]["AutomaticColdTreatmentMode"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Get Nested Value
kw.doc: Extract a value from a nested dict using a dot-separated path. e.g. "RefeerOperatingMode.AutomaticColdTreatmentMode" → data["RefeerOperatingMode"]["AutomaticColdTreatmentMode"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Get Nested Value
kw.doc: Extract a value from a nested dict using a dot-separated path. e.g. "RefeerOperatingMode.AutomaticColdTreatmentMode" → data["RefeerOperatingMode"]["AutomaticColdTreatmentMode"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Wait For Blob File
kw.doc: Polls blob_root/{device_id}/{operation_hours}/ for any .json file. Returns the parsed content as a dict and deletes the file. Raises TimeoutError if no file appears within timeout seconds.

kw.name: Get Nested Value
kw.doc: Extract a value from a nested dict using a dot-separated path. e.g. "RefeerOperatingMode.AutomaticColdTreatmentMode" → data["RefeerOperatingMode"]["AutomaticColdTreatmentMode"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Get Nested Value
kw.doc: Extract a value from a nested dict using a dot-separated path. e.g. "RefeerOperatingMode.AutomaticColdTreatmentMode" → data["RefeerOperatingMode"]["AutomaticColdTreatmentMode"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Get Nested Value
kw.doc: Extract a value from a nested dict using a dot-separated path. e.g. "RefeerOperatingMode.AutomaticColdTreatmentMode" → data["RefeerOperatingMode"]["AutomaticColdTreatmentMode"]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.
